title: Blessings
description: Adds a potion effect called "Blessings" that reduces owner's damage and saves owner's life when possible
body:
This mod adds a "Blessing" potion effect that reduces the damage dealt to owners by (1 - 80% ^ effect's level).

In addition, when the owner takes lethal damage, this effect will be consumed, reducing this damage to 0 and setting the owner's health to (the length of time remaining on this effect when lethal damage is taken / the length of time it was in effect when it was gained * 100)% of its maximum health.

This effect is currently only available through the /effect command, so modpackers need to do their own modifications for it to be used in survival normally.

This mod is inspired by the skill effect of a role in [Aoqichuanshuo](http://aqsy.100bt.com/) (a game in China).

CurseForge: [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blessings](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blessings)
